title: Minimum Moves to Equal Array Elements II
titleCn: 最小操作次数使数组元素相等 II

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3] Output: 2 Explanation: Only two moves are needed (remember each move increments or decrements one element): [1,2,3] => [2,2,3] => [2,2,2]
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Only two moves are needed (remember each move increments or decrements one element): [1,2,3] => [2,2,3] => [2,2,2]
